sections.title: Contacting through NPC Contact's Random option

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a brave knight! I am coming to kill anyone in the vicinity of Lumbridge Castle!

lines.speaker: Hans
lines.text: Hello. What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for whoever is in charge of this place.

lines.speaker: Hans
lines.text: Who, the Duke? He's in his study, on the first floor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have come to kill everyone in this castle!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. I'm lost. Where am I?

lines.speaker: Hans
lines.text: You are in Lumbridge Castle, in the Kingdom of Misthalin. Across the river, the road leads north to Varrock, and to the west lies Draynor Village.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me how long I've been here?

lines.speaker: Hans
lines.text: Ahh, I see all the newcomers arriving in Lumbridge, fresh-faced and eager for adventure. I remember you...

lines.speaker: Hans
lines.text: You've spent [amount] days, [amount] hours, [amount] minutes in the world since you arrived [amount] days ago.
